prompt: Please compare cases CAS-6765 and CAS-9765; report each name, follow-up date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. In the final recap, give the target ID first, original follow-up date second, and corrected follow-up date third.

follow_up_turns.content: For Incorrect renewal date for Harbor Gym (CAS-6765) only, set the follow-up date to 2026-11-10. Leave CAS-9765 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for CAS-6765: set the follow-up date to 2026-12-14, not 2026-11-10. The other case must still remain untouched.

records.name: Incorrect renewal date for Harbor Gym
Incorrect renewal date for Harbor Gym archive

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first follow-up date.
Replace the superseded follow-up date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both follow-up date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected follow-up date as current and the first requested follow-up date as superseded.
The final recap must present these items in order: target ID; original follow-up date; corrected follow-up date.
